title: anthyllis vulneraria f. lutea
intro: Anthyllis vulneraria f. lutea, also known as yellow kidney vetch, is a flowering plant that belongs to the legume family and is native to Europe and Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it effective in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Anthyllis vulneraria f. lutea include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and providing relief from symptoms of eczema and dermatitis. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, can be used to harness its medicinal properties, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
